column6: Description

Bring a room to life while adding a touch of coziness and warmth with accent pillows.  Available in square, rectangular and bolster shapes in a variety of sizes, these versatile pieces can be mixed and matched for a layered look or arranged in any combination to create the ideal mix of texture and color.

FEATURES:
Ģ Square, rectangle and bolster pillows.
Ģ Upholstered on both sides, with concealed zipper enclosure.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $161.

Designed by Chris Panichella

Savvy design and superior comfort set the stage for Achella, an expressive lounge collection featuring straight and tapered lines beautifully counterbalanced with fluid contours. Combining metal, wood and upholstered elements, Achella lounge, love seat and sofa models deliver stellar form and aesthetic brilliance - not to mention a variety of options to realize a purpose beyond simply waiting.

FEATURES:
Ģ Lounge, love seat and sofa models.
Ģ Standard base configuration includes maple wood platform with fixed metal legs or casters.
Ģ Wood platform available in all standard and custom wood finishes on maple.
Ģ Signature metal leg available in polished aluminum, metallic silver and satin black finish options.
Ģ Multi-functional accessories to include rotating tablet, cup holder and power units, available on select models.
Ģ Tablet affixed to right or left arm, and is offered in maple veneer, laminate and Corian«.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 350 lbs. for lounge chairs, 700 lbs. for love seats and 1000 lbs. for sofas.
Ģ Accompanying modular seating and occasional tables offered.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $2,354.

Designed by Chris Panichella

Versatile in every way imaginable, the Achella Modular Collection embodies creative freedom in the realm of public seating. Arm and armless lounge seats, tables and benches align together to form configurations of curvilinear descent, classic straight-line arrangements, or a combination of both to create inspired arrangements of limitless potential.

FEATURES:
Ģ Arm and armless lounge chairs available individually or in modular combinations.
Ģ Two back heights: 29 1/2" and 32 1/2".
Ģ Straight, 30-degree inside wedge and 30-degree outside wedge models.
Ģ Tables available in 12" and 22" wide straights, 30-degree narrow, 30-degree wide and 90-degree dimensions. Finish options include maple veneer, laminate and Corian«.
Ģ Benches offered in 22" wide straight, 30-degree and 90-degree options.
Ģ All models feature signature metal leg, with three finish choices.
Ģ Power units available on select models.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 350 lbs.
Ģ Lounge starting COM list price = $1,703.
Ģ Bench starting COM list price = $1,416.
Ģ Table starting list price = $1,428.

Designed by Chris Panichella

Accentuated by a distinctively slender, metal leg design, Achella occasional tables achieve a sophisticated balance between simplicity and substance. Ideal as a complement to Achella lounge and modular seating, or equally appealing by themselves, tables are offered in round, square and rectangle shapes with three fixed leg finishes.

FEATURES:
Ģ Round, square and rectangle table shape options.
Ģ Available in multiple sizes as well as custom dimension options.
Ģ Maple veneer, laminate and Corian« selections, in all standard and custom finishes.
Ģ Signature metal legs available in three finishes.
Ģ Optional power units available for added functionality.
Ģ Accompanying lounge and modular seating offered.
Ģ Starting list price = $1,789

Designed by Chris Panichella

Achellita makes it easy to create kid-friendly zones anywhere one is needed. Designed for little ones, the collection includes lounge chairs and connecting tables that are modular in form to build functional and playful configurations, bringing joy and comfort to the forefront of the waiting experience.

FEATURES:

Designed by Rainlight

From its bold stature and relaxed seated style to its use of mixed materials and varied upholstery combinations, there are reasons aplenty to love AllSorts. With table and technology options providing multipurpose functionality, this fun-spirited seating collection is designed to support individual work as well as offer a friendly atmosphere for group dynamics of all kinds.

FEATURES:
Ģ Select models available with or without back.
Ģ Features ash wood platform with solid wood edge.
Ģ Seating models with tables also offered, with ash veneer or laminate table finish selections.
Ģ Metal legs finished in matte black as standard.
Ģ Charcoal grey, metallic silver, satin black and premium colors also available. Upcharge applies.
Ģ Various power units offered, with multiple placement locations.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 500 lbs. for single seat bench and 48" wide narrow bench.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 750 lbs. for two-seat bench and 60" wide narrow bench.
Ģ Corresponding children's seating collection, SmallSorts, also available.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $1,614.

Designed by Qdesign

A study in contrasts, Archetype is both structured and softly contoured, substantial in form yet compact in size, and while it may convey simplicity, its subtle nuances make it anything but.

FEATURES:
Ģ Single lounge, 2-seat and 3-seat models.
Ģ Arms offered in 4 1/2" and 8" widths.
Ģ Low-profile black feet with adjustable glides as standard.
Ģ Accessories include power technology for convenient connectivity and pillows to add aesthetic versatility.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 350 lbs. per seat.
Ģ Accompanying modular seating and occasional tables available.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $1,904.

Designed by Qdesign

Inspired by familiar architectural forms, Archetype is a modular lounge collection with a robust presence that effortlessly radiates comfort. Arm and armless seating models, together with beautifully imagined adjoining table options, provide the building blocks to create welcoming arrangements for any space.

FEATURES:
Ģ Arm and armless lounge units available in modular configurations with corner unit and connecting tables.
Ģ Arms offered in 4 1/2" and 8" widths and are positionable at seat ends or atop connecting tables.
Ģ Connecting inline and end tables offered in walnut or white oak veneer and laminate, in single and
two-tone combinations.
Ģ Accessories include power technology for convenient connectivity and pillows to add aesthetic versatility.
Ģ Modular arrangements can stand-alone or connect more permanently with ganging brackets.
Ģ Seating and table units feature low-profile black feet with adjustable glides as standard.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 350 lbs. per seat.
Ģ Accompanying lounge seating and occasional tables available.
Ģ Lounge starting COM list price = $1,904.
Ģ Table starting list price = $2,871.

Designed by Qdesign

Archetype occasional tables draw upon the structured form of their lounge and modular counterparts to further celebrate the beauty of contrast. Choose between single and multitone finishes or a split top to create a stunning statement piece worthy of conversation. Whatever the combination, its depth of craftsmanship and limitless appeal is undeniable.

FEATURES:
Ģ Square tables offered in 36" and 42" sizes.
Ģ Open interior offers room for storage or accessory display.
Ģ Tables available in walnut or white oak veneer and laminate, in all standard and custom finishes.
Ģ Tops available in single-tone and split finish options.
Ģ Low-profile black feet with adjustable glides as standard.
Ģ Accompanying lounge and modular seating available.
Ģ Starting list price = $3,889.

Designed by Ramsey Madsen & Jim Contois

Beautifully structured, with an emphasis on subtle details and expert craftsmanship, Avelina is more than a pretty face. Concealed wire management, tech-friendly options and adjustable glides are among its true strengths, followed by its broad range of flexibility in sizes and finish selections. Well-suited for casual meeting spaces, co-working stations, collaborative areas and more, Avelina is the winning combination of style and substance for today's evolving workspaces.

FEATURES:
Ģ Available in 29" and 42" table heights, in various lengths.
Ģ Depth options include: 20", 30", 36" and 42".
Ģ Offered in maple, walnut and white oak veneer as well as laminate, Fenix, Corian« and Formica Colorcore« finish options.
Ģ Fenix offered in five standard colorways.
Ģ Panel bases feature adjustable glides as standard for leveling purposes.
Ģ End panel bases, center panel bases and underside of tables feature removable panels for wire management accessibility.
Ģ Select technology options for top surface and/or side-mount placement available on all sizes.
Ģ Starting list price = $7,730.

Designed by David Ritch and Mark Saffell of 5D Studio

The geometric interplay of lines within the metal base create the striking visual from which Betwixt gets its name. Combine with a variety of table surface options, and the end result is a perfect balance of modern style to bring any room together.

FEATURES:
Ģ Tops are 1/2" thick and offered in ash and walnut veneer, laminate, Fenix, Corian« and back-painted glass.
Ģ Fenix offered in five standard colorways.
Ģ Available in three sizes.
Ģ 3/8" diameter metal rod base available in standard and premium finishes.
Ģ Starting list price = $1,080.
Ģ Available on Quick-Ship

Designed by David Dahl

Shapely on all fronts, Chatter combines generous seated comfort with the beauty and warmth of wood. Available with or without upholstered seat and back pads, it complements counter and bar height surfaces with effortless style, and is always at the ready for the myriad of interactions to be had.

FEATURES:
Ģ Available in beech, walnut and white oak, in all standard and custom finishes.
Ģ All wood, wood with upholstered seat or wood with upholstered seat and back options.
Ģ Counter and bar height models.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity of 275 lbs.
Ģ Metal footring offered in chrome only.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $1,255.
Ģ Available on Quick-Ship

Designed by Ramsey Madsen

From collaboration and socialization to focused work or essential downtime, there's nothing that can't be accomplished with Conduit. While it may appear minimalistic in form, a depth shines through in its fine details and graceful artistry, resulting in a welcoming hub that fits in everywhere and keeps you at the center of activity.

FEATURES:
Ģ Available in 29" and 42" table heights, in various lengths.
Ģ Depth options include: 30", 36", 42" and 48".
Ģ Table lengths of 84" and 96" come standard with underside box bridge for stability as well as housing for optional electrical units.
Ģ Offered in ash, maple and walnut veneer as well as laminate, with solid wood edge.
Ģ Veneer available in all standard and custom finishes, with direction running lengthwise on all tables. Laminate tops will be inset with 1/16" reveal.
Ģ Legs are veneer-wrapped steel with low profile glides, unless specified with Formica Brite White solid laminate top. In those instances, paint will be applied directly to the steel.
Ģ Select technology options for top surface placement available on all sizes.
Ģ Starting list price = $5,717.

Designed by Qdesign

Taking its cue from the shared society of today, Co-op is all about bringing people together. Designed to function equally well in existing or new spaces, these open to semi-private meeting enclaves can be positioned anywhere and require no elaborate construction to create a custom built-in feel. Supremely comfortable and exceptionally versatile, Co-op is the essential collective for communicating, working and inspiring one another to achieve more.

FEATURES:
Ģ Collection includes public and private seating models - with and without canopy.
Ģ Stand-alone and single units available in addition to select back-to-back models.
Ģ Public versions stand 43-1/2" tall, private at 56-3/4" high and private with canopy at 88-1/2" high.
Ģ Canopy available with or without overhead cut-out detail.
Ģ Accent tier on select models available upholstered, or with veneer or laminate finish.
Ģ Integrated tables featured on select models, in multiple sizes and heights as applicable.
Ģ Metal post for tables offered in standard and premium finish selections.
Ģ All units feature 2" high black plinth base.
Ģ Optional accessories include cantilever table, shelf, storage cubby, power units and overhead LED light fixture.
Ģ Accent tier, tables and shelf offered in maple, walnut and white oak wood veneer in addition to laminate selections.
Ģ Accompanying meeting tables also offered.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $3,622.

Designed by Qdesign

Creating a sense of community, Co-op Meeting Tables serve a multitude of purposes with understated style. As an accompaniment to its seating counterpart, or used independently with other products, the collection fulfills spatial and seating preferences of all kinds, thanks to its abundant offering of sizes, heights, top shapes and finish selections. Modern, versatile and durable, Co-op Meeting Tables are the go-to solution for all types of gatherings, from highly productive meetings to lighthearted social activities, and everything in-between.

FEATURES:
Ģ Arc square and arc rectangle tables manufactured in maple, white oak and walnut.
Ģ All standard and custom wood finishes available as well as laminate selections.
Ģ Fenix offered in five standard colorways.
Ģ Offered in 27" and 29" heights, together with a variety of top sizes.
Ģ 1-1/2" table top thickness, with veneer or laminate self edge options.
Ģ Base available in standard and premium metal finishes.
Ģ Accompanying seating collection also offered.
Ģ Starting list price = $4,790.

Designed by Qdesign

Accompanying the Co-op Meeting Spaces collection, these individual work modules offer a personal zone to counterbalance group-activity, shared areas and deliver a stand-alone solution for today's adaptable spaces. Featuring a wealth of options to ensure all comforts are met, the Co-op Single provides the ultimate place where time can be well spent.

FEATURES:
Ģ Collection includes public free-standing, private free-standing and private free-standing with full canopy models.
Ģ Accent tier panel available in upholstery, veneer or laminate material.
Ģ Modules standard with 27" high integrated table.
Ģ Integrated table available in maple, walnut and white oak veneer, as well as laminate selections.
Ģ Overhead recessed LED swivel light, with touch-controlled power button, available on full canopy models.
Ģ Power units available on front and side of seating units and on tables.
Ģ Accompanying multi-seating models and meeting tables also offered.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $6,813.

Designed by Ramsey Madsen

Experience the transformative power of nature with these statement-making planters. Available in square and rectangle shapes, in neutral, bold or custom colors, they perfectly complement any variety of greenery and create a more inviting atmosphere for all.

FEATURES:
Ģ Square and rectangle planters manufactured in aluminum.
Ģ Panels feature interlocking visual effect and are available in standard and premium finishes.
Ģ Interior shelf positioned 12" from the top.
Ģ Interior liner and concealed self-leveling glides included.
Ģ Indoor use only.
Ģ Starting list price = $1,299.

Designed by David Ritch and Mark Saffell of 5D Studio

Slip into something exceptionally comfortable with Dava. With two back heights accommodating various preferences, its soft and rounded forms convey a relaxed state of being to face the day ahead with ease. Offered on a metal swivel base for those craving movement, or a fixed wood alternative, either will surely enhance the surroundings it occupies in spades.

FEATURES:
Ģ Mid and high back models with wood base or metal swivel base.
Ģ Metal swivel base comes standard with auto-return feature.
Ģ Optional contrasting stitch available in 12 colors.
Ģ Swivel base available in all standard and premium finishes.
Ģ Wood base offered in all standard and custom finishes on ash.
Ģ Accompanying ottoman with metal swivel base also available.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 350 lbs. for lounge models and 300 lbs. for ottomans.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $1,167.

Designed by Ramsey Madsen & Jim Contois

There are few symbols as evocative of casual gatherings as the picnic table and Delen captures the essence of this modest, yet iconic setting, while reinterpreting it for today's relaxed, collaborative spaces. Benches feature solid wood construction offset by a metal accent detail on the leg interior - a signature design element that adds a touch of sophistication to its otherwise minimalist form. Paired with Delen Meeting Tables, or used independently, they bring a nostalgic connection to spaces from which sharing can occur in all its forms.

FEATURES:
Ģ Manufactured in ash and walnut wood species.
Ģ Bench seat is 1-1/2" thick and available in solid wood, veneer, laminate and Fenix options.
Ģ Fenix offered in five standard colorways.
Ģ Bench legs manufactured in ash solid wood and feature metal accent detail on leg interior, as well as adjustable glides for leveling purposes.
Ģ Starting list price = 2,270.

Designed by Ramsey Madsen & Jim Contois

Wood and metal elements combine to create eye-catching details that set Delen apart from the rest. Its casual setting naturally evokes sharing, collaborating and engaging, while a variety of heights and sizes ensures meetings of all styles can be enjoyed en masse, and with untold purpose.

FEATURES:
Ģ Table tops manufactured in ash and walnut wood species.
Ģ 1-1/2" top thickness for rectangle tables, and 1-1/4" for wall-mount and sidebar tables.
Ģ Plank-style available on sidebar and rectangle tables.
Ģ Veneer, laminate and Fenix options.
Ģ Fenix offered in five standard colorways.
Ģ Two table heights offered: 29" and 42".
Ģ Wall-mount and sidebar tables available with or without metal foot rest.
Ģ Select technology options for top surface placement available on all sizes.
Ģ Accompanying benches manufactured in ash and walnut wood species and feature metal accent detail on leg interior.
Ģ Starting list price = $3,402.
Ģ Select Models Available on Quick-Ship

Designed by Qdesign

Designed to stimulate the sharing of ideas, thoughts and experiences, Domo is an extensive collection of products centered on bringing people together, and creating a workspace for bringing out their best. Series includes swivel-based and mobile lounge chairs, modular lounge seating and benches.

FEATURES:
Ģ Benches available individually or in modular combinations with each other as well as accompanying lounge seating models and tables.
Ģ Offered in 2 and 3-seat rectangular or 120-degree pentagonal shapes.
Ģ Asymmetrical pentagonal bench features five sides and seats up to four.
Ģ Metal platform base available in three standard finishes.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 350 lbs. per seat position for 120-degree models, 700 lbs. for two-seat models and 1050 lbs. for three-seat units.
Ģ Complementary modular and lounge seating available as well as occasional tables.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $2,191.

Designed by Qdesign

Whether in lobbies and public seating areas, or casual meeting environments and touchdown spaces, Domo abounds with possibilities. Lounge chairs with casters or a swivel base make an excellent choice for workgroups - the ever growing collaborative work style. Opt for a rotating tablet or pull-up table and Domo becomes the gateway to productive freedom. Yet for all its functionality, Domo is equally pleasing in traditional lounge settings where simply waiting in comfort is all that is required.

FEATURES:
Ģ Arm and armless lounge, love seat and sofa models.
Ģ Mobile lounge chairs also offered.
Ģ Select models available individually or in modular combinations.
Ģ Optional rotating tablet available in veneer, laminate or Corian« finishes.
Ģ Metal platform base available in polished aluminum, charcoal grey, and metallic silver.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 350 lbs. for lounge chairs, 700 lbs. for love seats and 1000 lbs. for sofas.
Ģ Accompanying modular seating, pull-up table, benches and occasional tables available.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $2,015.
Ģ Select Models Available on Quick-Ship

Designed by Qdesign

Come together with Domo Modular - the highly evolved and inspired collection that sparks ideas and experiences. Modern and inviting, these lounging accommodations provide the ideal segue to thoughtful interactions in creative workspaces, while the modularity aspect allows for flexibility and functionality across a variety of applications. For collaborating or working solo, to socializing or simply lounging, Domo creates truly authentic engagements on every level.

FEATURES:
Ģ Arm and armless lounge, love seat and sofa models.
Ģ Available individually or in modular combinations with corner lounge units, connecting tables and benches.
Ģ Corner, inline and end tables available in veneer, laminate and Corian.
Ģ Seating units with arms and all tables available with optional accessories to include rotating tablets, power units, and ganging bracket.
Ģ Veneer options for tablets include all standard and custom finishes on maple, walnut and white oak.
Ģ Metal platform base available in polished aluminum, charcoal grey, and metallic silver.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 350 lbs. for lounge chairs, 700 lbs. for love seats and 1000 lbs. for sofas.
Ģ Accompanying lounge and bench seating available as well as occasional tables.
Ģ Lounge starting COM list price = $2,015.
Ģ Bench starting COM list price = $2,191.
Ģ Table starting list price = $1,705.

Designed by Qdesign

Designed to stimulate the sharing of ideas, thoughts and experiences, Domo is an extensive collection of products centered on bringing people together, and creating a workspace for bringing out their best. Series includes swivel-based and mobile lounge chairs, modular lounge seating, benches and occasional tables.

FEATURES:
Ģ Tables manufactured in maple, walnut and white oak.
Ģ Square and rectangle shapes offered in multiple sizes.
Ģ Asymmetrical pentagonal table features five sides and is available individually as well as in modular combinations with coordinating lounge seating and benches.
Ģ Metal platform base available in three finishes.
Ģ Starting list price = $2,167.

Designed by Qdesign

Designed to stimulate the sharing of ideas, thoughts and experiences, Domo is an extensive collection of products centered on bringing people together, and creating a workspace for bringing out their best. Series includes swivel-based and mobile lounge chairs, modular lounge seating, benches, pull-up table and occasional tables.

FEATURES:
Ģ Overall dimensions: 18" W x 14" D x 27" H.
Ģ Table top is 14" W x 18" L with 3/4" thickness, and is offered in maple, walnut and white oak veneer, as well as laminate and Corian« selections.
Ģ Metal base offered in three finishes.
Ģ Complementary modular, lounge and bench seating available.
Ģ Starting list price = $1,271.

Designed by Gemma Bernal

However you approach it, Flipside offers a comfortable and stylish place to do all things. Available with or without a backrest, its signature style is de’¼üned by wood details, a durable metal frame and seat cushions with suspension webbing for lasting comfort. For short or long stays, there's no better place to be than on the Flipside.

FEATURES:
Ģ Two, three and four-unit combinations for stand-alone and modular configurations.
Ģ Seating units offered with or without backrest as well as arms.
Ģ Available fully upholstered or with accents on outside back and seat/backrest ends.
Ģ Outside back accents available in white oak veneer, laminate or Fenix.
Ģ Seat/backrest ends are solid wood and will match outside back as standard.
Ģ Passive-flex backrest and suspension webbing in seat cushions provide continuous comfort.
Ģ Integrated, connecting and end tables offered in white oak veneer, laminate, Corian and Fenix.
Ģ Options include power technology, clean-out between seats and tamper-resistant floor mount hardware.
Ģ 350 lb. weight capacity per seat.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $1,954.

Designed by David Ritch and Mark Saffell of 5D Studio

Flirt creates a place to come together, collaborate, listen and learn. Its broad offering of multi-use, reconfigurable products enable the maximization of different settings, inspiring and supporting the work at hand. Whether meetings are planned for impromptu, include many attendees or only a few, or require the sharing of spaces, Flirt changes and adapts to needs at any given moment.

FEATURES:
Ģ Offered in 39" or 48" widths, and stands 71" tall.
Ģ Material options include maple, walnut and white oak veneer, laminate, upholstered with tackable surface or whiteboard, in any combination.
Ģ Monitor-ready mounting option available on veneer, laminate and whiteboard panel surfaces and features a PB3 power unit (two outlets and two USB charging ports).
Ģ Die-cast aluminum legs available in standard and premium finishes and feature four locking casters.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $3,563.

Designed by David Ritch and Mark Saffell of 5D Studio

As collaborative and learning environments have become more relaxed, the adaptability of limited space, reconfiguring needs and comfort are still key. Flirt's nesting capability and ease of mobility provide endless configuration opportunities, ensuring all manners of gathering are achieved with ease. It also appeals from a visual standpoint, with a light-scale modern design that beckons whether in use or in the nested position. Multi-functional in smaller corporate settings or sprawled across larger educational institutions, the accommodating abilities of Flirt fits them all - and everything in between.

FEATURES:
Ģ 4-leg and swivel base models with fixed or flip-up seat options.
Ģ 4-leg base available with chrome casters or on glides.
Ģ Flip-up seat allows endless nesting capability for moving and storage ease.
Ģ Swivel base features auto-return as standard (fixed seat only).
Ģ Die-cast aluminum legs available in all standard and premium metal finishes.
Ģ Optional flip-up rotating tablet offered in maple, walnut and white oak veneer, as well as laminate selections.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity is 350 lbs.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $1,984.
Ģ Select Models Available on Quick-Ship

Designed by David Ritch and Mark Saffell of 5D Studio

Playing into the informal meeting styles of the workplace today, Flirt Lounge offers a more casual sit with the added benefit of nesting for space-saving requirements. The soft edges along the back and the lower splayed open arms encourage sitting in multiple positions while the interplay of the high-profile cast aluminum legs and the generous, open formed upholstery gives the collection its unique appearance. Offered in two back heights, various base configurations, and with optional flip-up tablet, Flirt maintains its charming personality throughout to easily earn its beloved status.

FEATURES:
Ģ Mid and high back models available with 4-leg or swivel base.
Ģ 4-leg base available with chrome casters or on glides.
Ģ Fixed seat or flip-up for infinite nesting capability.
Ģ Swivel base features auto-return as standard (fixed seat only).
Ģ Die-cast aluminum legs available in all standard and premium metal finishes.
Ģ Optional flip-up rotating tablet offered.
Ģ Tablet available in maple, walnut and white oak veneer, as well as laminate selections.
Ģ Maximum weight capacity of 350 lbs.
Ģ Starting COM list price = $2,333.

Ģ Whiteboard option includes storage slot for markers, erasers, etc.

Ģ Valet table offered in maple, walnut and white oak veneer as well as laminate selections.
Ģ Side-mount power unit and monitor-ready mounting options offered.
Ģ Die-cast aluminum legs available in standard and premium finishes and feature four locking casters.

Whether meetings are planned for impromptu, include many attendees or only a few, or require the sharing of spaces, Flirt changes and adapts to needs at any given moment.

FEATURES:
Ģ Round and arc square top shapes offered in maple, walnut and white oak veneer as well as laminate, Fenix, Corian« and back-painted glass.
Ģ Fenix offered in five standard colorways.
Ģ Metal base manufactured in aluminum and offered in standard as well as premium finish selections.
Ģ Offered in custom heights between 26" - 42".
Ģ Base design facilitates wire management for through-the-surface electrical and/or data capability.

Designed by David Ritch and Mark Saffell of 5D Studio

Multipurpose tables flip-up and nest for quick and easy transitions from room to room, or from one set-up to another. With its mix of table shapes, sizes, heights, edge details, integrated wire management and more, the sky's the limit for this ultimate meeting resource. Complementary pieces include presentation tools that also double as dividers for added privacy or delineating space, while fixed base tables serve a bevy of more traditional meeting requirements. All in all, Flirt provides the opportunity to create engaging environments, strengthen interactions and become the creative destination coveted by all.

FEATURES:
Ģ Fixed and flip-up tables manufactured in maple, walnut and white oak veneer as well as laminate and Fenix selections.
Ģ Half-round, rectangle and trapezoid table shapes available in 27", 29" and 42" heights.
Ģ Flip-up tables feature single-lever release mechanism for quick and easy set-up and storage.
Ģ Reconfigurable and offered with optional ganging mechanism for more permanent connections.
Ģ Corner and end connecting tables, modesty panels and various power/data technology units also available.
Ģ Die-cast aluminum legs, with locking casters or glides, available in all standard and premium metal finishes.
Ģ Interior leg column features removable panel for vertical wire management.
Ģ Coordinating meeting and occasional tables with pedestal base also available.
Ģ Starting list price = $2,368.

Designed by David Ritch and Mark Saffell of 5D Studio

Transform open spaces again and again with Flirt screens, a light-scale companion to the multitasking family of tables, seating and training accessories. Serving as both a room divider and a means for creating private nooks for individual focus, screens are offered in both mobile and stationary styles and nest together when not in use to provide even further convenience.

FEATURES:
Ģ Fully upholstered, non-tackable surface.
Ģ Available in two widths with overall height of 68".
Ģ Die-cast aluminum legs, with locking casters or glides, available in standard and premium metal finishes.
Ģ Casters suitable for carpet or hard surface flooring.
